reviewedPaths.assessment: Low-compute governance paths read block.timestamp before bounded storage updates; no Groth16 verification or unbounded loop is in the timestamp-capped frame.

These overloads can read block.timestamp when deadlineOrZero is nonzero. The current public mainnet relayer selector is 0x678d8506 and constructs deadlineOrZero=0, so this timestamp path is not used by the approved production relayer binding.

acceptedLimitations: This is a static public review artifact, not a mainnet execution trace.
Deadline-enabled overloads remain constrained by MegaETH volatile metadata compute cap and require separate remote gas evidence before relayer promotion.
